mapper.sql: select order_id, order_no, customer_id, order_date, delivery_date, total_amount, discount_amount, final_amount, order_status, sales_user_id, require_shipping_photo, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from oms_order
mapper.insert: insert into oms_order(order_no, customer_id, order_date, delivery_date, total_amount, discount_amount, final_amount, order_status, sales_user_id, require_shipping_photo, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{orderDate}, #{deliveryDate}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{finalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{salesUserId}, #{requireShippingPhoto}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{remark})
mapper.delete:
update oms_order set del_flag = '2' where order_id in
#{orderId}
